mapper.sql: PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, DIAGNOSIS_TYPE, DIAGNOSIS_NO, DIAGNOSIS_CODE, CODE_NO, DIAGNOSIS_CODE_GL
mapper.select: select T.PATIENT_ID, T.VISIT_ID, T.DIAGNOSIS_NO, T.DIAGNOSIS_DESC, T.TREAT_RESULT, C.DIAGNOSIS_TYPE, C.DIAGNOSIS_CODE from diagnosis T LEFT JOIN diagnostic_category C ON T.PATIENT_ID = C.PATIENT_ID and T.diagnosis_no = C.DIAGNOSIS_NO and T.diagnosis_type = C.DIAGNOSIS_type and T.visit_id = C.visit_id where T.diagnosis_type='3' and T.diagnosis_no=1 and T.PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.TREAT_RESULT = '死亡';
mapper.insert: insert into DIAGNOSTIC_CATEGORY (PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, DIAGNOSIS_TYPE, DIAGNOSIS_NO, DIAGNOSIS_CODE, CODE_NO, DIAGNOSIS_CODE_GL) values (#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{diagnosisType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diagnosisNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{diagnosisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{diagnosisCodeGl,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into DIAGNOSTIC_CATEGORY
PATIENT_ID,
VISIT_ID,
DIAGNOSIS_TYPE,
DIAGNOSIS_NO,
DIAGNOSIS_CODE,
CODE_NO,
DIAGNOSIS_CODE_GL,
#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{diagnosisType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diagnosisNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{diagnosisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{codeNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{diagnosisCodeGl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
